title: BSE Odisha Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: BSE Odisha Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Odisha Result 2026 Released for Class 10th on the official website - bseodisha.ac.in on 02-05-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the BSE Odisha result.

content.text: The Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (BSE Odisha) has officially released the Odisha Class 10th Result 2026 for the academic session 2025-26. Students who appeared for the High School Certificate (HSC) examinations can now check their results online. Odisha Result 2026 has been released on the official website - bseodisha.ac.in.

The board has published results for Class 10 students across various subjects including English, Mathematics, Science, Social Science, Hindi, and regional languages. Students can easily check and download their marksheet by entering their roll number and date of birth on the official result portal.
Students are advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the result. In case of any discrepancies, they should immediately contact the BSE Odisha authorities at Cuttack for correction.

The Board of Secondary Education, Odisha has successfully published the Class 10th Result 2026 on its official portal with an impressive overall pass percentage of 95.33%. Students can access their mark sheets by entering their roll number and date of birth on bseodisha.ac.in or orissaresults.nic.in, and the result is available for download in PDF format for future reference. Out of 5,44,670 registered students, 5,36,306 students appeared for the examination, and 5,19,251 students successfully passed, with 3,310 schools recording a 100% pass percentage in 2026.

rows: Board of Secondary Education, Odisha (BSE Odisha)

content.text: The Board of Secondary Education, Odisha has activated the direct links to check Class 10th Result 2026 on its official portal. Students who appeared for the High School Certificate (HSC) examination in February-March 2026 can now view and download their results instantly through the official website using the links provided in the table below. The result is available on multiple portals including bseodisha.ac.in, orissaresults.nic.in, and results.digilocker.gov.in to ensure quick and seamless access for all students.

links.label: Odisha Class 10th Result 2026 - Roll Number Wise

sections.heading: How to Check Odisha Class 10th Result 2026

content.text: Students can follow these simple steps to check and download their Odisha Class 10th Result 2026 from the official website:

items: Visit the official website of Board of Secondary Education, Odisha at bseodisha.ac.in or orissaresults.nic.in
On the homepage, look for the Annual Examination Result 2026 link or HSC Result 2026 link
Click on the Odisha 10th Result 2026 link to proceed
A new login window will appear on the screen
Enter your Roll Number as mentioned on the admit card
Enter your Date of Birth in the DD/MM/YYYY format
Click on the Submit or Find Result button
Your Odisha Class 10th Result 2026 will be displayed on the screen with complete details
Check all details including student name, roll number, father's name, mother's name, school name, and subject-wise marks carefully
Verify the theory marks, practical marks (if applicable), total marks obtained in each subject, overall grade, division, and qualifying status
Download the marksheet in PDF format and save it on your device
Take a printout of the result for admission and future reference

structured_links.label: Odisha Class 10th Result 2026 - Roll Number Wise
